steps.title: Find the narrator's irony
steps.content: Aunt Clara thinks her questions show 'dark and mysterious diplomacy' and 'low cunning.' The narrator undercuts that self-image by calling her devices 'most transparent.'

steps.title: Match the presentation
steps.content: B overstates the focus as intellectual ambition. C makes her mainly nosy, and D defends her intentions. The point is comic contrast between her confidence and her obvious tactics. The answer is A.
